name: Software Release Pipeline
description: Complete software release workflow: code review, tests, documentation, and release notes

steps.name: code-review
steps.prompt_template:
Please review this code for quality, security, and best practices:

{{input}}

steps.name: security-scan
steps.prompt_template:
Perform a security analysis on this code. Look for vulnerabilities, security issues, and potential risks:

{{input}}

steps.name: performance-analysis
steps.prompt_template:
Analyze this code for performance considerations, potential bottlenecks, and optimization opportunities:

{{input}}

steps.name: create-documentation
steps.prompt_template:
Create comprehensive documentation for this code. Include:
1. Purpose and overview
2. Key features
3. Usage examples
4. Important notes

Code:
{{input}}

steps.name: generate-release-notes
